sections.paragraph:
ἐνφωνέω (not found elsewhere) Lk 16:24 D (Tdf. app. for φωνέω). S. also ἐκφωνέω.

D D = Didache, except that in a list of manuscripts or as textual variant D refers to Codex Bezae—List 1

Tdf. Tdf. = CvTischendorf—List 1, beg.

app. app. = appendix, apparatus (when ref. to marginal text-critical information, esp. in N.)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 342
